info.name: Email Microservice
info.description:
Complete API reference for the Email Microservice.

**Base URL:** `{{baseUrl}}` (default: `http://localhost:3500`)

**Auth:** None — this service is internal-network only, secured at the infra layer.

**Key behaviours:**
- `template` and `templateId` are interchangeable in the send body.
- In Kafka mode (`ENABLE_KAFKA=true`) the async `POST /send-email` returns **202 Queued**; the sync endpoint always sends directly.
- The sync endpoint (`POST /send-email/sync`) only exists when `ENABLE_SYNC_ENDPOINT=true`.
- `idempotencyKey` deduplicates within `IDEMPOTENCY_TTL_MS` (default 1 h, in-memory).

**Capture request IDs:** The "Send Email" folder requests all contain a test script that saves the returned `requestId` into the `lastRequestId` collection variable so log-lookup requests are pre-filled automatically.

variable.description: Base URL of the email microservice
Auto-populated after any send-email request — used by the log-lookup requests

item.name: Health & Monitoring
item.description: Liveness and readiness probes, plus internal metrics.

request.description: Fast liveness check. Always returns 200 when the process is running.
Deep health check that pings MongoDB and the SMTP relay. Returns **200** when all dependencies are reachable, **503** when MongoDB is disconnected.
Internal counters: total emails sent/failed/queued, circuit breaker states, and optional MongoDB aggregate stats.

item.name: Send Email – Auth & User
item.description:
Auth/user-lifecycle notification templates shared across all microservices.

All requests capture the returned `requestId` into `{{lastRequestId}}` via a test script.

request.description: Send the welcome email with email-verification link to a freshly registered user.
Confirmation sent after a user successfully verifies their email address.
Sends a password-reset link. `expiryHours` tells the user how long the link is valid.
Security notification sent after a password is successfully changed.
Alert sent when a login is detected from an unrecognised device or location.
Notification sent after a failed login attempt.
Sent when an account is locked due to too many failed login attempts.
Confirms to the user that their account lock has been lifted.
Sends the self-service unlock / account-recovery link.
Security notification confirming two-factor authentication was turned on.
Security notification confirming two-factor authentication was turned off.
Notifies a user when a new role is assigned to their account.
Confirms that a social OAuth account (Google, GitHub, etc.) was linked.
Notification sent when an account is permanently terminated.

item.name: Send Email – Web Agency
item.description: Templates used by the web-agency-backend-api service for contact forms, project inquiries, newsletter subscriptions, and proposal delivery.

body.raw:
{
  "to": "admin@webagency.com",
  "templateId": "CONTACT_NOTIFICATION",
  "data": {
    "name": "John Smith",
    "email": "john.smith@example.com",
    "phone": "+44 7700 900123",
    "company": "Acme Ltd",
    "subject": "Website redesign enquiry",
    "message": "Hi, we are interested in a full website redesign for our company. Could you send us more info?",
    "submittedAt": "2026-03-08T10:00:00Z",
    "contactId": "contact_xyz789"
  }
}

request.description: Sent to the agency admin when a contact form is submitted on the website.
Auto-reply sent to the person who filled in the contact form.

body.raw:
{
  "to": "admin@webagency.com",
  "templateId": "INQUIRY_NOTIFICATION",
  "data": {
    "name": "Sarah Connor",
    "email": "sarah@skynet.io",
    "phone": "+1 555 0199",
    "company": "Skynet Inc.",
    "projectType": "webapp",
    "budget": "25k-50k",
    "timeline": "3-6months",
    "description": "We need a customer portal with dashboard and reporting.",
    "requirements": ["SSO integration", "Real-time charts", "PDF exports"],
    "submittedAt": "2026-03-08T10:00:00Z",
    "inquiryId": "inq_001",
    "inquiryNumber": "INQ-2026-001"
  }
}

request.description: Sent to the agency admin when a detailed project inquiry is submitted.
Auto-reply sent to the prospect after submitting a project inquiry.
Welcome email sent after a newsletter subscription is confirmed.

body.raw:
{
  "to": "sarah@skynet.io",
  "templateId": "PROJECT_PROPOSAL_EMAIL",
  "data": {
    "clientName": "Sarah Connor",
    "projectName": "Skynet Customer Portal",
    "proposalUrl": "https://yourapp.com/uploads/proposals/proposal_inq_001.html",
    "proposalNumber": "PROP-2026-001",
    "issueDate": "2026-03-08",
    "validUntil": "2026-04-08",
    "companyName": "Web Agency Co.",
    "contactEmail": "hello@webagency.com",
    "contactPhone": "+44 20 7946 0001",
    "message": "Please find attached our detailed proposal for the Skynet Customer Portal project. We look forward to working with you.",
    "baseUrl": "https://yourapp.com"
  }
}

request.description: Delivers a project proposal to a prospect. `proposalUrl` links to the rendered HTML proposal hosted on the web-agency-backend-api `/uploads/proposals/` path.

item.name: Send Email – Org & Access Control
item.description: Organisation lifecycle and access-management notification templates.

request.description: Welcome email to the owner when a new organisation is provisioned.
Invitation email sent when a user is added to an organisation.
Notification when an organisation's subscription plan is upgraded or downgraded.
Security notification when a new API key is generated for an organisation.

item.name: Send Email – Finance & Commerce
item.description: Payment, invoice, order, and subscription notification templates.

request.description: Receipt email sent after a successful payment.
Alert sent when a payment attempt fails.
Sent when an invoice is generated for a customer.
Order confirmation email sent to the customer.

item.name: Send Email – Advanced Options
item.description: Demonstrations of advanced request features: CC/BCC, attachments, idempotency keys, custom `from`, multiple recipients, and the synchronous endpoint.

body.raw:
{
  "to": "primary@example.com",
  "cc": ["manager@example.com", "team@example.com"],
  "bcc": "compliance@example.com",
  "templateId": "CONTACT_NOTIFICATION",
  "data": {
    "name": "John Smith",
    "email": "john.smith@example.com",
    "phone": "+44 7700 900123",
    "company": "Acme Ltd",
    "subject": "Urgent project enquiry",
    "message": "We need a quote ASAP.",
    "submittedAt": "2026-03-08T10:00:00Z",
    "contactId": "contact_cc_test"
  }
}

request.description: Shows how to send to multiple CC recipients (array) and a single BCC recipient (string). Both fields accept either a string or an array.

body.raw:
{
  "to": "client@example.com",
  "templateId": "PROJECT_PROPOSAL_EMAIL",
  "data": {
    "clientName": "Jane Doe",
    "projectName": "E-commerce Redesign",
    "proposalUrl": "https://yourapp.com/uploads/proposals/proposal_001.html",
    "proposalNumber": "PROP-2026-002",
    "issueDate": "2026-03-08",
    "validUntil": "2026-04-08",
    "companyName": "Web Agency Co.",
    "contactEmail": "hello@webagency.com",
    "contactPhone": "+44 20 7946 0001",
    "message": "Please find the PDF summary attached.",
    "baseUrl": "https://yourapp.com"
  },
  "attachments": [
    {
      "filename": "proposal-summary.pdf",
      "content": "JVBERi0xLjQKJcfs...",
      "contentType": "application/pdf",
      "encoding": "base64"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Demonstrates attaching a file via base64 content. Replace the `content` value with a real base64-encoded file.

exec: // Re-send this same request to see the 202 'already processed' response

request.description:
Sends with an `idempotencyKey`. If you send this same request a second time within the TTL window (default 1 hour), the service returns **202 Already Processed** without sending a duplicate email.

`idempotencyKey` must be alphanumeric only (`/^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$/`).
Sends a single email with multiple addresses in `to`. All recipients receive the same rendered template.
Overrides the `DEFAULT_FROM_EMAIL` env var with a custom `from` address for this specific message.

Forces a **synchronous** SMTP delivery even in Kafka mode — always returns **200** with a `messageId` when successful.

⚠️ This endpoint only exists when `ENABLE_SYNC_ENDPOINT=true` in the service `.env`. Returns **404** otherwise.
Demonstrates passing a custom `X-Request-ID` header for distributed tracing correlation. The server echoes this value back in the `requestId` field of the response.

item.name: Email Logs
item.description: Query email delivery logs stored in MongoDB. All endpoints require MongoDB to be connected (503 otherwise).

request.description: Returns the most recent 100 log entries (default `limit=100`, `skip=0`, sorted by `createdAt` descending).
Filters logs to a specific delivery status. Valid values: `queued`, `sent`, `failed`, `retrying`.
Retrieves all logs created within the given date window.

query.description: MongoDB sort spec as JSON string

request.description: Demonstrates pagination (`skip` / `limit`) and a custom sort field. `sort` is a JSON string parsed server-side.
Looks up a single email log by its `requestId`. The `{{lastRequestId}}` variable is automatically populated by the test scripts in the Send Email folder — just run any send request first.

item.name: Error Scenarios
item.description: Reference requests that demonstrate error responses from the service.

request.description:
Missing the required `to` field — returns **400 VALIDATION_ERROR** with a `details` array.

Expected response:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
  "details": [{ "field": "to", "message": "\"to\" is required" }]
}
```

Neither `template` nor `templateId` is provided — Joi `.or()` validation fires.

Expected response:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
  "details": [{ "message": "\"value\" must contain at least one of [template, templateId]" }]
}
```

A template ID that doesn't exist in `emailTemplate.js` — returns **400 TEMPLATE_ERROR**.

Expected response:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "TEMPLATE_ERROR",
  "message": "Template not found: THIS_TEMPLATE_DOES_NOT_EXIST"
}
```
`idempotencyKey` must match `/^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$/` (alphanumeric only, no hyphens or special characters).
